items.name_en: 💖《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💖Aphrodite Small Shoulder Bag. Gucci explores the path of craftsmanship with modern design aesthetics, cleverly blending classic brand elements with beloved brand icons. This small shoulder bag features ample space, crafted from black soft leather, with a striking double-G logo on the closure. Black soft leather, black enamel brass hardware with ceramic finish, microfiber lining, inside: one zip pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (30cm high) with double-G magnetic snap, weight: approx. 0.35kg.

Color: Black/Original Leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💕Includes full original green box packaging💕GG👉The Gucci Cosmogonie collection debuted at the historic Montecastle in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Mixed-color canvas, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.

On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Rose pink soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.
Model: 726274.
Dimensions: 39(W)x 38(H)x 2(D)
Color: Rose pink/Original leather.
